# imisofts

> imisofts is a full-stack digital execution partner specializing in cold email marketing infrastructure, B2B lead generation, AI automation, web development, and e-commerce solutions. We help businesses scale outbound sales and automate operations, delivering measurable ROI in 30-90 days.

imisofts serves clients globally from Dubai, UAE. Founded in 2020, we have completed 500+ projects across 30 countries. Our core expertise is building cold email infrastructure that achieves 95%+ inbox placement rates, AI-powered business automation that reduces manual work by 60-80%, and high-converting web applications.

## Core Services

- [Cold Email Marketing & Infrastructure](https://imisofts.com/cold-email-marketing): Professional cold email infrastructure setup including private email servers, domain procurement, DNS authentication (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), IP warming, campaign automation, and deliverability optimization. Achieve 95%+ inbox rates. Packages from $1,497/month.
- [B2B Lead Generation](https://imisofts.com/lead-generation): Done-for-you B2B lead generation delivering 40-100+ qualified sales appointments per month. Omnichannel outreach using cold email, LinkedIn, and intent data targeting. 10:1 average ROI. First appointments in 14 days.
- [AI Automation Services](https://imisofts.com/ai-automation): Custom AI workflow automation including AI phone agents, WhatsApp chatbots, n8n workflows, document OCR, and CRM automation. Reduce manual work by 70%. Deploy in 2-6 weeks.
- [Digital Marketing](https://imisofts.com/digital-marketing): Data-driven performance marketing including paid media (Google Ads, Meta Ads), SEO, email marketing, and cold outreach campaigns. Measurable ROI from $2,999/month.
- [Web Development](https://imisofts.com/web-development): Modern web applications built with React, Next.js, and custom frameworks. 100/100 Lighthouse scores, mobile-first design. Fixed pricing, 2-6 week delivery.
- [E-commerce Development](https://imisofts.com/ecommerce): Shopify store development, dropshipping setup, multi-currency support, COD integration, and full e-commerce automation. Store setup in 2 weeks.
- [CRM Development](https://imisofts.com/crm-development): HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, and custom CRM implementation. Sales automation, RevOps optimization. Deploy in 2-6 weeks.
- [Shopify App Development](https://imisofts.com/shopify-apps): Built for Shopify certified app development. Conversion boosters, inventory management, custom integrations. Ship in 4-6 weeks with guaranteed App Store approval.
- [AI Mobile App Development](https://imisofts.com/ai-mobile-apps): Intelligent mobile apps with on-device AI, voice recognition, computer vision, and personalization. React Native and Flutter. Ship in 3-10 weeks.
- [GoHighLevel Services](https://imisofts.com/gohighlevel-services): GHL automation, AI voice agents, A2P 10DLC verification, reputation management, landing pages, and white-label SaaS setup. Certified GHL developers. Deploy in 2-4 weeks.

## Case Studies & Results

- [Case Studies](https://imisofts.com/case-studies): Real client results including 300% revenue growth, 10:1 ROI on lead generation campaigns, and 70% reduction in manual operations through AI automation.

## Blog & Knowledge Base

- [Blog](https://imisofts.com/blog): Expert insights on cold email marketing, AI automation, lead generation, and digital growth strategies.
- [Cold Email Marketing with Instantly.ai Guide](https://imisofts.com/blog/cold-email-marketing-instantly-ai-2025/): Complete guide to cold email marketing using Instantly.ai platform.
- [Instantly vs Smartlead Comparison](https://imisofts.com/blog/instantly-vs-smartlead-comparison-2025/): In-depth comparison of the two leading cold email platforms.
- [Saleshandy vs Instantly vs Smartlead](https://imisofts.com/blog/saleshandy-vs-instantly-vs-smartlead-2025/): Ultimate three-way comparison based on 5M+ emails sent.
- [Cold Email Sending Limits Guide](https://imisofts.com/blog/cold-email-sending-limits-2025/): Comprehensive guide to email sending limits across all major providers.
- [Best Cold Email Subject Lines](https://imisofts.com/blog/best-cold-email-subject-lines-2025/): Data-backed subject line templates that drive opens.
- [Cold Email Templates for Revenue](https://imisofts.com/blog/cold-email-templates-5m-revenue-2025/): Proven email templates that generated $5M+ in pipeline.
- [AI Sales Agents for Cold Email](https://imisofts.com/blog/ai-sales-agents-autonomous-cold-email-2025/): How autonomous AI agents are transforming cold email outreach.
- [AI Agents for SMB Automation](https://imisofts.com/blog/ai-agents-smb-automation-2025/): Practical guide to deploying AI agents for small business automation.
- [n8n Workflow Generator](https://imisofts.com/blog/n8n-workflow-generator-ai-2025/): AI-powered n8n workflow generation tool and guide.
- [AI Marketing Automation for SMBs](https://imisofts.com/blog/ai-marketing-automation-smb-growth-2025/): How SMBs can leverage AI for marketing automation and growth.
- [Instantly.ai Lead Generation Guide](https://imisofts.com/blog/instantly-ai-lead-generation-guide-2025/): Step-by-step guide to generating leads with Instantly.ai.
